name: io.github.bbb-build/mascope-mcp
description: World MiniApp reviews and analytics — verified human ratings via World ID

tools.name: search_miniapps
tools.description: Search World MiniApps by keyword, category, or sort criteria

tools.name: get_app_details
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific MiniApp

tools.name: get_app_reviews
tools.description: Get World ID-verified reviews for a MiniApp

tools.name: get_trending_apps
tools.description: Get trending apps sorted by growth rate

tools.name: get_category_analytics
tools.description: Category breakdown with app count and top apps
